title: Milkbasket Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Milkbasket Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Milkbasket Ventures Solutions family as a Full Stack Developer in Srinagar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Milkbasket Ventures Solutions:
Milkbasket Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket Ventures Solutions!
